summary: 2020-02-29 - New York Yankees (5) @ Boston Red Sox (2) (Final)
2020-03-03 - Boston Red Sox (1) @ New York Yankees (9) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Montgomery will be recalled to make his season debut. He was a camp standout this spring and summer, appearing all the way back from Tommy John surgery. Montgomery appeared in two big league games (one start) last year.
away_pitcher_note:
Weber makes his second start of the season after
allowing six earned runs over 3 2/3 innings in a
July 26 loss to the Orioles. Weber has made three
career appearances against the Yankees -- all in
relief -- posting a 2.84 ERA over 6 1/3 innings.
summary: 2020-07-31 - Boston Red Sox (1) @ New York Yankees (5) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Tanaka has recovered from a concussion sustained on July 4. The veteran struggled mightily against the Red Sox last year, permitting 22 earned runs in eight innings (24.75 ERA), including a disastrous start during the London Series.
away_pitcher_note:
Godley will serve as Boston's opener in
his second appearance of 2020. The right-hander,
who joined the club on a Minor League deal in
mid-July, struck out seven over four innings of
scoreless relief against the Mets on July 27.
summary: 2020-08-01 - Boston Red Sox (2) @ New York Yankees (5) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Paxton is aiming to rebound after recording only three outs in a 41-pitch start against the Nationals on July 25. Making his return from back surgery performed in February, Paxton permitted three runs and five hits in the Yanks' 9-2 loss.
away_pitcher_note: The righty has made 110 Major League appearances, but this will be his first start in what will be a bullpen game for the Red Sox. In his only previous outing at Yankee Stadium, Brice turned in a scoreless inning.
summary: 2020-08-02 - Boston Red Sox (7) @ New York Yankees (9) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Cole recorded double-digit strikeouts for the first time as a Yankee in his last start, whiffing 10 Rays over 4 2/3 innings in a no-decision at Tropicana Field. Cole said he saw "good improvement" in the effort, which marked his 26th consecutive start without a loss, a streak which dates to last season and is the fifth-longest in big league history.
away_pitcher_note: Brewer will be first out of the gate in what will be a bullpen game for Boston. This will be Brewer's first career start. He has pitched two innings, giving up two runs, over three appearances at Yankee Stadium.
summary: 2020-08-14 - Boston Red Sox (3) @ New York Yankees (10) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Paxton is coming off an encouraging 11-strikeout outing against the Rays in which his fastball touched 93.9 mph. Crediting mechanical tweaks to create separation with his hips, he permitted one hit through six scoreless innings before serving up a pair of homers in the seventh, settling for a no-decision.
away_pitcher_note: The flame-throwing righty was strong in his last start, equaling a career high of 10 strikeouts while walking none over six innings against the Blue Jays. Eovaldi has pitched well at Yankee Stadium in his career, going 10-5 with a 3.54 ERA.
summary: 2020-08-15 - Boston Red Sox (5) @ New York Yankees (11) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Happ is returning to the rotation after being skipped. It has been a struggle thus far for the veteran, who has allowed eight runs in seven innings to the Orioles and Phillies. He walked six batters in his last outing and said that he needs to be more aggressive in the strike zone against Boston.
away_pitcher_note: Mazza will be recalled to make the first start of his career. The righty fared well in his one relief appearance this season, holding the Yankees scoreless over 2 2/3 innings.
summary: 2020-08-16 - Boston Red Sox (2) @ New York Yankees (4) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: Montgomery notched his second win of the season last time out, holding the Braves to three runs and four hits over six innings. Montgomery spun five efficient scoreless frames before permitting a three-run Marcell Ozuna homer in the sixth.
away_pitcher_note: The lefty has been on a roll of late, turning in three straight solid starts, in which he's given up four runs over 16 1/3 innings. Perez has pitched just once at Yankee Stadium in his career, giving up seven runs over five innings on Aug. 12, 2018.
summary: 2020-08-17 - Boston Red Sox (3) @ New York Yankees (6) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: The veteran has been Boston's most consistent starter this season. Pérez got the win in his last start at Tropicana Field, holding the Rays to three runs (two earned) over five innings.
away_pitcher_note: Montgomery recorded a career-high nine strikeouts in his last outing, holding the Orioles to an unearned run and three hits over 5 2/3 innings. This will be Montgomery's third start of the season vs. the Red Sox, whom he defeated on July 31.
summary: 2020-09-18 - New York Yankees (6) @ Boston Red Sox (5) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: The 30-year-old rookie will again serve as the Red Sox's opener. Mazza is 1-1 with a 6.28 ERA in four starts this season. He is 0-1 with with a 6.35 ERA against the Yankees.
away_pitcher_note: Happ's last five starts have been excellent, with the veteran pitching to a 2.45 ERA while striking out 27 batters against five walks. He grinded through five innings against the Orioles his last time out, allowing one run and five hits.
summary: 2020-09-19 - New York Yankees (8) @ Boston Red Sox (0) (Final)

home_pitcher_note: The 24-year-old prospect will try to follow up his sparkling debut with another strong effort in his introduction to the Red Sox-Yankees rivalry. Against the Marlins, Houck fired five shutout innings, striking out seven.
away_pitcher_note: García has won his past two starts, each with seven innings and six strikeouts against the Blue Jays. The 21-year-old idolizes Boston icon Pedro Martinez, which should make it a special experience to touch the mound at Fenway Park.
summary: 2020-09-20 - New York Yankees (2) @ Boston Red Sox (10) (Final)
